{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Dragon Court
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Dragon Court]] convicted [[Queen Shyrax]] of high treachery.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Dragon Court]] convicted [[Shyrax the Third]] of treason.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Convicted by the Dragon Court of high treachery and imprisoned about eight months ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
